subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that under the sheltering care and divine providence we dwell in utmost peace, composure, assurance and tranquility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله در ظل حفظ و عنایت الهیه در نهایت سکون و قرار و اطمینان و استقرار
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
